metadata.description: Austin's Claude Code plugin marketplace — opinionated DX plugins for agentic coding workflows.

plugins.name: modern-unix-tools
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to prefer modern Rust/Go/C++ replacements for classic Unix tools. Includes a skill with full mapping (ripgrep/fd/sd/bat/eza/zoxide/dust/delta/hyperfine/tokei/grex/tealdeer/watchexec/just/jq/yq) and syntax divergence cheatsheets.

plugins.name: kbac
plugins.description: Knowledge graph development toolkit — Cypher authoring guidance, TypeBox schema patterns, graph query design, and session context injection for the kbac Neo4j knowledge base

plugins.name: edf
plugins.description: Enhanced Document Format toolkit — agents and skills for EDF document authoring, validation, runbook orchestration (executor + strategist), decision-tree patterns, workflow design, and EDF-specific Neo4j Cypher patterns. Companion plugin to the @austyle-io/edf TypeScript library.
